title: Effects of Breathing Exercises in Patients With Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease: A Network Meta-analysis
journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation
headline: Effects of Breathing Exercises in Patients With Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease: A Network Meta-analysis
summary: A meta-analysis / systematic review of yoga examined clinical research. A network meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (RCTs) was conducted to compare and rank the effectiveness of various breathing exercises for patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).
keyFindings: A network meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (RCTs) was conducted to compare and rank the effectiveness of various breathing exercises for patients with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD).
We searched PubMed, Web of Science, Embase, and the Cochrane Library databases to determine the articles.
limitations: Pooled estimates combine heterogeneous studies; effect sizes vary by practice, population, and control condition.
The practice studied (yoga) is not the Miracle of Mind practice; findings do not transfer directly to MoM.
